## toPascalCaseJsIdentifier() function

Similar to [toPascalCase()](./common.topascalcase.md)<!-- -->, but drops heading non-letters

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare function toPascalCaseJsIdentifier(str: string): string;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  str | string |  |

<b>Returns:</b>

## Example


